productDisplayName: Nike Fragrances Men Cool Wind Perfume 150 ml
description: A part of the nike fragrances 150 Beyond Elements line, the nike fragrances Cool Wind for men comes in a colour happy flask, styled to look like a sipper, so delectable that your olfactory senses will never get enough of this. Fruity and woodsy, this aroma's top notes are wild mint, grapefruit, and orange, with base notes of wood, sandal wood and musk. Wear this with semi-formal ensembles.Caution: Flammable, Keep away from sources of ignition, Keep away from children. Do not use near fire, flame or heat, Avoid spraying near the eyes
